recommendations.overview: Judge Clarence Thomas' nomination to the United States' Supreme Court is called into question when former colleague, Anita Hill, testifies that he had sexually harassed her.

recommendations.title: Our Family Wedding
recommendations.overview: The weeks leading up to a young couple's wedding is comic and stressful, especially as their respective fathers try to lay to rest their feud.

recommendations.title: Ten Inch Hero
recommendations.overview: Four friends search for love and happiness while working at a California sandwich shop.

recommendations.title: Ovosodo
recommendations.overview: From childhood to fatherhood, Piero learns things the hard way while growing up in a working-class neighborhood of Livorno.

recommendations.overview: A good-natured but unlucky Italian is constantly going on a difficult situations, but never lose his mood.
